young-broad-beans-and-peas-salad-with-qu.name: Young Broad Beans And Peas Salad With Quinoa
young-broad-beans-and-peas-salad-with-qu.original_name: Ensalada de habas tiernas y guisantes con quinoa

ingredients.item: 1 taza de habas tiernas, limpias y peladas
1 taza de guisantes frescos o congelados
1/4 taza de hojas de menta fresca, picadas
3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva extra virgen

instructions: Cooking the quinoa as instructed by the package. While cooking, you can prepare beans and peas

In a big frying pan, heats 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat. Add tiddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddAdd salt and pepper to your taste. When the quinoa is ready, add it to the frying pan with the beans and peas. Mix well so that flavors are combined and quinoa impregnates with vegetable juices. You can add more olive oil if necessary.
In a small bowl, mix lemon juice, 2 tablespoons olive oil, salt and pepper.
Fold this dressing onto the mixture of quinoa, beans and peas. Add mint and cilantro leaves and mix gently. Serves the salad of tender and peas with quinoa as a main plate or accompaniment
